items.title: Jammu and Kashmir: Kashmiri Pandit's eatery sparks 'ghar wapsi' calls
items.summary: Akash Dhar, a visually impaired Kashmiri Pandit, opened a restaurant in Langate. Local residents and his landlord have offered significant support and encouragement. The eatery...
